product.name: Master Kong Iced Black Tea
selling_points: Cool and refreshing for hot days.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Hot days make you feel overheated and sluggish; many drinks don’t instantly feel cooling.
creative_strategy.promise: A quick sip delivers an instant cool, refreshing relief.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Exaggeration can turn the cooling benefit into a bold, single-shot lighting shift from hot to cool, keeping it playful and credible without needing complex liquids or VFX.

candidate_categories.reason: Strong visual contrast (warm-to-cool light) instantly communicates refreshment for a bottled tea in one simple, feasible shot.
candidate_categories.risk: If the lighting shift is too subtle, the exaggeration may feel unclear; ensure a noticeable but natural color temperature change.

candidate_categories.reason: Showing a person enjoying the drink in a summer moment communicates satisfaction and context.
candidate_categories.risk: Requires more set dressing and continuity; risk of clutter and weaker immediacy vs. a bold hook.

candidate_categories.reason: Close-ups of the bottle can look appetizing and brand-forward.
candidate_categories.risk: Fine details like condensation or label text may drift; less emotional impact than an exaggerated mood shift.

creative_design.selling_angle: Instant cool-down refreshment in the heat.
creative_design.visual_grammar: One-scene exaggerated mood switch: warm, sun-baked look flips to cool, blue tone during a single sip; tight person-and-product framing.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: Dramatic but plausible lighting and color-temperature shift from warm/orange to cool/blue as the sip happens.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: Bottle stands on a sun-warmed tabletop bathed in golden light, signaling a hot day.
creative_design.action_arc: A hand reaches in, grabs the bottle, takes a quick sip; as they sip, the scene’s lighting cools to blue and the person’s expression relaxes; they bring the bottle closer with the label facing camera.
creative_design.payoff: Cool-toned scene holds on the bottle near camera and a small satisfied nod from the person.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Single locked camera, one subject, no pouring, no ice, no condensation micro-details. The only ‘exaggeration’ is an overall color-temperature and brightness shift, which is a simple, robust cue for open-source models.

character.appearance: One young adult, neutral friendly look, light to medium skin tone, natural appearance.
character.wardrobe: Plain light-colored short-sleeve T-shirt (no logos), casual summer style.
character.hair_makeup: Simple, neat hair; natural makeup with a clean, fresh look.
character.performance_style: Restrained, clear actions: reach, sip, small relieved smile, subtle nod; no big gestures.

scene.lighting: Start: warm, sunny amber tone; End: cool, soft blue tone after sip.
scene.background: Plain beige wall with a soft sunlit patch; uncluttered and clean.

product.visual_identity: Master Kong Iced Black Tea plastic bottle with amber tea tone and brand label; cap intact; upright and clean.

single_shot.visual_prompt: A single continuous shot of a light-wood tabletop against a plain beige wall. The Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference stands upright at center on the table. The scene feels like a hot afternoon: warm, golden sunlight spreads across the wall and tabletop, with a slightly hazy amber tone. After a brief beat, a person enters the frame from the right. Their hand reaches in, picks up the bottle, and brings it to their mouth for a quick sip. As they drink, the overall scene smoothly shifts from warm amber to a cooler blue tone, as if the room’s temperature dropped: the wall and tabletop color temperature cools, the light becomes crisp and refreshing, and the person’s expression relaxes into a small relieved smile. They lower the bottle slightly and bring it closer toward the camera with the label facing forward, holding it steady in the cool-toned light. The person gives a small satisfied nod while holding the bottle near the lens. The camera remains locked throughout, no added props or text in scene.
single_shot.start_frame_prompt: Transform the product reference image into a full-scene first frame: Place the Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle from the reference image standing upright on a clean light-wood tabletop. Behind it, a plain beige wall shows a gentle, warm sunlit patch to suggest a hot afternoon. Lighting is warm, golden, and slightly amber. No hand or person is visible in this first frame. No additional props are present; the scene is minimal with only the tabletop, the beige wall, and the bottle.
single_shot.text:
Opening (warm tone): Beat the heat
Payoff (cool tone): Cool in a sip
single_shot.audio: Music: light, sunny groove that shifts to a crisp, cool chime when the sip happens. SFX: a soft whoosh timed with the warm-to-cool lighting change. Performance: a subtle, satisfied ‘ahh’ on the exhale.
